## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows PEP 8 (Python) and project conventions
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, README_CN, API docs)
- [ ] Docker build tested (`docker build -t omniseq .`)
- [ ] API endpoints tested (`curl` or browser)
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (`/home/user/`, `/mnt/c/` — use env vars instead)
- [ ] No `np.random` or synthetic data in chart functions
- [ ] Real data sources documented for all new chart functions
